payload.answer: I cannot commit a durable memory for this article because the fetch failed with a 404 network error and no article content was available.

entity_resolution.reason: The referenced URL could not be fetched (404 network error), so there is no reliable article content to resolve or store.

details: Input requested remembering an article at https -//examplecom/missing why - useful for memory architecture

repair_options: Retry fetching the URL with a corrected address
Provide the article text or a working link
If you want, store only the user-provided note as an unverified reminder, but not as article content
